title: 読書少女とあるカエルの友人

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day Zenno Rob Roy and Sweep Tosho
have been preparing for—the first day of Reading
Week.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I knew it'd be busy, but the central plaza really is
incredibly crowded... I hope I don't get too
nervous and bungle something...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's too late to be getting nervous. We've come
this far, so all we can do now is do our very best!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... You really are amazing, Sweep. You're
always so unflappable...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What? Even I get butterflies whenever I try out a spell for the first time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Even genius magical girls mess up sometimes...
But it's like Granny always said...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
To perform magic, you need a homemade wand, a
mysterious spell... and a smidgeon of courage.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Courage...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for promoting an event—you can't
let fear stand in your way! You'll never succeed if
you don't try, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: This is gonna spread the wonders of magic far and wide, so I'm not backing out! What about you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I... I want to make this a success too! I want to
share the stories I love so dearly!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: A smidgeon of courage... Even I can manage that!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: What's their deal? Look at their outfits.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they're promoting Reading Week. I
wonder if it's gonna be different from last year.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (There are even more people here than before...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(...But I can't let fear stand in my way! I've got to
be brave and push on ahead! Isn't that right,
Sweep?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the success of Reading Week hanging in the
balance, the first page of a new story is turned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is the story of a cowardly girl who must venture
out to find a witch capable of undoing the curse
that turned her friend into a frog.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...It can't be. Is that really true?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It is. Only a true hero can use the curse-breaking
magic. If anyone else recites the spell, they'll turn
into a frog themselves!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(She's a cowardly girl, just like me... And when I
needed courage back then, I found it in her
words.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(She was afraid too, but she wanted her dream to
come true. And this is what she said...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm no hero... I'm just a scaredy-cat. But all the
same...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You need courage to make your dreams come
true! I'm going to pull this off so I can protect the
people who are important to me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle, little star! ☆ Return to how you
really are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice echoes out firmly, full of determination.
Without a moment's delay, I hit the music and, in
the role of the friend, step into the story.
choice_data_list: Thank you so much! You changed me back!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It worked! Even though I'm not a hero...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You set out on a journey to save a beloved friend
and recited the spell without flinching in the face
of danger. You're no scaredy-cat. You're a true
hero.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: (Woooo!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for staying to watch!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The library staff are holding an exhibition in the
A/V room, where wonderful stories await!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I hope... from the bottom of my heart... that this
experience helps you fall in love with the world of
fiction!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, why don't we go take a look at the
exhibition?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it sounds kinda fun this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the event promotion finishes. As
for the exhibition itself...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, nothing does the trick like a fantasy
booth. ♪ Did you see their faces when we
charmed them with magic?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Bravo, brave heroes. I saw your performance in
the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Each story was so captivating... My friend is
delighted as well...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-really?! That's great!

text_block_list.name: Exhibition Attendee
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I was wondering if you could tell me
about this story in more detail.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's Rob Roy...
choice_data_list: Why don't you go help her?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-right! With pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Okay, be brave and tell her all about it... It's a
book you love, and want everyone else to love
too... The tale of Rob Roy!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first day of Reading Week is a success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And seeing Zenno Rob Roy proudly explaining
the story, I find myself thinking the rest of the
week is going to go just fine too.
